name: Oatmeal Raisin Drops
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees. In a medium bowl, combine flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon. Add sweetener. Stir in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Beat egg with vanilla and water. Stir into dry ingredients. Fold in raisins until all ingredients are moistened. Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls onto a nonstick cookie sheet, making 32 cookies. Bake 10 to 12 minutes, until lightly browned. Remove from oven and cool on a rack. Makes 8 servings; each serving contains 4 cookies. Each serving provides: 1 Bread, 1 Fat, 1/2 Fruit, and 6 additional calories (add 24 calories if brown sugar is actually used as the sweetener).
